reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
색도 너무 이쁘고 전자레인지 사용 가능하다는 점에서 너무 좋아요! 습식이나 생식파라 주로 냉장고에 보관해두는데 그릇을 따뜻하게 데피거나 살짝 데필 습식이 있을때 담아서 사용하면 실용도가 너무 좋습니다!!
단호박브로콜리 치즈도 맛있게 잘 먹어요 ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: The color is so pretty and I love that it's microwave-safe! I usually keep wet food or raw food in the fridge, and it's so practical to warm up the bowl or slightly warm the wet food and serve it in this bowl!! My pup also enjoys the sweet pumpkin broccoli cheese treat 😊

reviews.name: 권****
reviews.content:
동결건조 형태로 급여하기 너무 쉽고
아이도 빠삭빠삭하니 너무 맛있게 잘먹어요! 
맘마 먹을때 토핑으로 주면 입맛을 돋구어 주는지 밥도 더 잘먹고 살찔걱정 없는 건강 간식이라 부담없이 줄 수 있어 굳굳 입니다!!
reviews.content_en: It's so easy to serve in freeze-dried form, and my pup absolutely loves the crispy texture! When I use it as a topping with meals, it seems to really boost her appetite so she eats even better. Plus, it's a healthy snack with no worries about weight gain, so I can give it without any hesitation. Highly recommend!!

reviews.name: 신****
reviews.content:
평소 치즈를 너무너무 좋아해서 특식 먹는 날이면 치즈를 꼭 올려주곤 하는데 이번에 동결건조치즈 간식이 나와서 한 번 급여해봤어요! 일단 너무 잘 먹는건 기본이고, 리틀코티지는 유산균까지 함께 챙길 수 있는게 큰 장점인 것 같아요!! 거기다 색도 알록달록하고.. 밥꾸 좋아하는 견주는 밥꾸며 줄 맛이 나서 좋네요,,,😋

+ 며칠 급여해 본 결과 똥이 더 건강해진 것 같기도…(?)
reviews.content_en:
My dog absolutely loves cheese, so I always add it on special treat days. I tried the new freeze-dried cheese treats and she gobbles it right up! Beyond that, LITTLE COTTAGE is great because you can also get probiotics with it!! Plus the colorful appearance is so cute, and for dog parents who love food styling, it looks perfect for Instagram pictures 😋

+ After giving it for a few days, her poop seems healthier too...(?)

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 메가주에서 샘플로 받았었는데 잘 먹어서 구매했어요! 실리콘 팟도 메가주에서 구매했었지만 하나 더 구매했습니다 고기 아니면 잘 안먹는 친군데 이거는 잘 먹네요
reviews.content_en: I got a sample from MEGAZU and my pup ate it well, so I bought the full product! I had already bought a silicone pot from MEGAZU, but I ended up buying another one. My dog doesn't usually eat anything unless it's meat, but she eats this really well!

reviews.name: 채****
reviews.content:
물 간식 줄 때 딱인 미니 실리콘 팟💛
개스널컬러인 노랑으로 선택해서 밥코스터랑 깔맞춤 해봤어요 :)
스무디독 위에 리틀코티지 콩콩 올려서 주니
환장하고 먹는 울 미쯔🐶
뚜껑이 있어서 음식 남으면 보관하기도 좋고,
냉동실 보관과 전자렌지 사용도 가능하니
화식 주시는 분들도 좋아보여요!

앞으로도 잘 사용하겠습니다🙇‍♀️🖤
reviews.content_en:
The perfect mini silicone pot for water-based treats 💛
I chose casual yellow to match my dog's placemat :)
When I put LITTLE COTTAGE Kong Kong on top of Smoothie Dog,
my Mitz goes absolutely crazy for it 🐶
The lid makes it easy to store leftover food,
and since it's freezer-safe and microwave-compatible,
dog parents who feed cooked meals would love it too!

I'll keep using this well going forward 🙇‍♀️🖤

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
냠냠 너무 맛있게 잘먹어용 ㅎㅎ
처음 먹는 간식인데도 거부감없이 아기새처럼 잘받아먹네용
reviews.content_en: Yum yum, eating so well! 😋 Even though it's a treat she's trying for the first time, she's accepting it without any hesitation and eating it like a little bird! ㅎㅎ

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
일단 실리콘이라 깨질 걱정 안해도되고 안전해서 좋아요!
전자레인지에 돌려서 줘야하는 화식도
그릇에 한번에 덜어서 해동할 수 있어 편리하구요!
파스텔톤에 식기라 이쁨+귀여움도 한몫해서 밥 주는 즐거움이 있네요!!!  (저희 강아지 빨리 먹고싶다고 짖는 모습jpg)
휴대성까지 좋아서 외출할때 들고다녀야겠어요!
바잇미 식기 잘 하네요~~!!!
reviews.content_en: First of all, it's silicone so I don't have to worry about it breaking and it's safe! 😊 For wet food that needs to be microwaved, I can just pour it into the bowl at once to thaw it, which is convenient! The pastel-colored dishes are so pretty and cute, so there's real joy in feeding time!!! (My pup barking because she can't wait to eat faster jpg 😂) The portability is great too, so I'll definitely bring it when we go out! BITE ME is doing well with their dishes~~!!! ✨

reviews.name: 한****
reviews.content:
밥꾸템으로 더 할 나위 없이 이뻐요
그리고 강아지도 너무 잘먹어요.
reviews.content_en: Perfect as a food styling item! 💕 And my dog eats so well from it too.

reviews.name: 오****
reviews.content:
단점보다 장점이 많은 실리콘 그릇!
1.말랑말랑하지도 단단하지도 않은 적당한 제질
2. 두껑이있어 화식먹다 남겨도 언제든 보관 ok
3. 밀폐가능! 물넣고 흔들었는데 새지않음!
4. 변색변질이 없어 걱정 no
5. 실리콘 제질이라 깨질 걱정 없고
마지막 전자렌지까지 사용가능에 미니멀한 
사이즈 2.8키로 달이가 사용하기엔 딱인 
넘귀여운 실리콘그릇 유용하게 잘쓰고이써용!
딸기&블루베리 유산균은 조그마한 사이즈 한입크기로
맛과 유산균을 동시에 챙겨주는!
기호성도 좋고 동결건조로 만든거라 식감도 굳
입맛까탈쟁이 말티즈 달이는 잘씹어먹어용
reviews.content_en:
A silicone bowl with more pros than cons! 👍
1. The material is just right—not too soft, not too hard
2. It has a lid, so even if food is left over, I can store it anytime
3. Airtight seal! I added water and shook it—no leaks! 💧
4. No discoloration or deterioration—no worries! ✨
5. It's silicone so no risk of breaking, plus it's microwave-safe and such a minimal, adorable size—at 2.8kg, it's just perfect for our Dali! Using it so well and loving it! 🥰 The strawberry & blueberry probiotics come in cute little bite-sized pieces, giving both taste and probiotics at once! The palatability is great, and since it's freeze-dried, the texture is really good. Our picky eater Maltese Dali chews it up so well! 😋

reviews.name: 황****
reviews.content:
생각했던 것 보다 단단하고 작아요.
밥에 두개 올려서 주는데 잘 먹어요~
무엇보다 성분 좋고 색상이 4가지라 더 좋아요~
reviews.content_en: It's firmer and smaller than I expected. 💭 I give her two pieces on her food and she eats well! ✨ Most importantly, the ingredients are great and I love that there are 4 different colors! 🌈

reviews.name: 공****
reviews.content:
평소 도기 그릇만 사용해서 외출 할 때마다 감자 밥 챙기기가 번거로웠는데,
요 실리콧팟으로 챙겨주니 넘 가볍고 편해서 좋아요! 👍🏻😋
크기도 손바닥만해서 휴대성까지 딱 좋아요
감자도 마음에 드는지 밥 깨끗이 해치웠네요 ㅎㅎ
전자레인지, 식세기 다 가능해서 앞으로도 쭉 애용할듯합니다~
reviews.content_en: I used to only use ceramic bowls, and it was always a hassle to pack potato rice whenever we went out. But with this silicone pot, it's so light and convenient! 👍🏻😋 The size fits perfectly in my palm, so it's great for portability too. Potato loved it so much that she cleaned her bowl completely ㅎㅎ Since it's microwave and dishwasher safe, I'll definitely keep using it going forward~

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 강아지가 잘먹어요, 밥꾸템으로 샀어용
reviews.content_en: My dog eats it well, I got it as a meal prep accessory! 😊

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
미니 실리콘 팟 - 버터 색상
리틀코티지 치즈 딸기&블루베리

일단 저희집 댕댕이는 도자기 , 스테인리스 그릇을 안좋아하고 무서워해요ㅎㅎ 평소에도 물과 밥은 실리콘 그릇을 사용하고 있고 외출할때 실리콘 용기 하나 있으면 좋겠다 싶었는데 체험단으로 받아서 정말 기뻤어요 !
크기는 아담한 편으로 뚜껑까지 딱 맞아요 헐거운 느낌이 전혀없고 간식 담아서 다니기에도 딱이네요
펜션이나 여행갈때 가방에 쏘옥 넣어서 다니다가 밥이나 물줘도 좋겠어요! 저희집 강아지는 치즈를 정말 사랑해요 !! 그래서 기호성은 걱정을 안했는데 역시나 너무 맛있게 먹고 계속 더 달라고 하네요 ㅎㅎ 만족하고 너무 좋아요!
reviews.content_en:
Mini Silicone Pot - Butter Color
Little Cottage Cheese Strawberry & Blueberry

Our pup doesn't like ceramic or stainless steel bowls and gets scared of them ㅎㅎ Normally we use silicone bowls for water and food, and I was hoping to find a silicone container for when we go out. I was so happy to receive this as a trial product! The size is compact and fits perfectly with the lid with no looseness at all, and it's perfect for carrying treats too. I'll definitely be slipping this into our bag for trips to the pension or when traveling, so we can give her food or water on the go! Our dog absolutely loves cheese!! So I wasn't worried about whether she'd like it, and sure enough, she's eating it so deliciously and keeps asking for more ㅎㅎ I'm so satisfied and really love it!

reviews.name: 인****
reviews.content: 유산균치즈 동결건조는 새로워서 구매해봤어요 ! 실리콘팟도 같이 저렴하게 구매 할 수 있어서 바로 다 질렀습니다 ㅎㅎ 생긴게 꽃모양이라 밥꾸 할 때 쓰면 딱일거같아요 ㅋㅋㅋㅋ 프불,비숑 두마리 다 기호성 좋네요 ㅎㅎ추천 추천 !! 실리콘 팟 갖고싶었는데 이번 기회에 밥꾸템이 하나 더 늘어서 좋아요 ^_^
reviews.content_en: I bought the probiotic cheese freeze-dried treat because it was something new! And since I could get the silicone pot at an affordable price too, I went ahead and got everything ㅋㅋㅋㅋ Since it's shaped like a flower, it'll be perfect for meal prep styling ㅋㅋ Both our Poodle and Bichon love it ㅎㅎ Highly recommend!! I've been wanting to get a silicone pot, and I'm so happy to have added another meal prep accessory to my collection this time ^_^

reviews.name: 재****
reviews.content:
리틀 코티지 유산균치즈 궁금했는데 봄이가 너무 잘먹어요,,🤍
밥꾸할때도 너무 좋고 귀여워요 !
앞으로 밥꾸할때 필수템이 될 것 같은 느낌이 드네요 :)
reviews.content_en: I was curious about Little Cottage Probiotic Cheese and Bom is eating it so well,,🤍 It's so great and cute for meal prep! I have a feeling this is going to become an essential item for our meal prep routine :)

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content:
직접 써보고 맘에들어서 다른색 그릇도 호다닥 구매했어요.
깨질 걱정도 없고 설거지는 식세기가 깨끗하게 해주니 걱정놉
유산균코티지는 아가들입맛에 맞는지 꼭 이거먼저 먹는답니다🐶👍🏻
reviews.content_en: I tried it myself and loved it so much that I quickly bought bowls in other colors too. No worries about them breaking, and the dishwasher cleans them perfectly so no concerns there either. The probiotic cottage cheese seems to match my pup's taste perfectly—she always eats this one first! 🐶👍🏻

reviews.name: 윤****
reviews.content:
🌟너모 맘에 드는 지점✨

1️⃣ 플래티넘 실리콘 사용! 👍
믿을 수 있는 안전한 소재인 것
식기용, 입이 닿는 용도에는 소재가 중요하다. 
이게 가격차이의 이유
플래티넘은 최고 안전한 등급의 실리콘!

2️⃣밀폐 가능한 뚜껑
뚜껑이 꼭 필요한 포인트였는데 밀폐까지 된다.
전날 밤에 꽝꽝 얼어있는 재료로 식단 준비를 해두고 
다음날 아침에 봉다리에 한겹싸서 아이와 함께 출근했다.
사무실 도착해서 열어보니 샌 것 하나도 없이 뽀송하게
잘 운반되어 무척이나 만족!!😚

3️⃣딱 좋은 사이즈
 소형견 식사용으로 딱 좋은 사이즈이다.
음식 양이 너무 적어보이거나 넘치거나 하지않고 
적당량이 예쁘게 담긴다! 
깊이도 딱이라 어디 옮겨 담을 필요 없고
뚜껑만 열어서 바로 그릇채 줄 수 있어서 넘 편함😁

4️⃣색이 예쁘고 마감이 좋음
사출면 날카로운데 거슬리는데 없고 
그릇 안쪽면이 매끈해서 설거지 쉽고 더 위생적! 
고민 많이 하고 신경 많이 쓴 제품인게 한눈에 느껴짐👀

5️⃣전자렌지, 열탕소독 가능!
이것도 편리한 사용을 위해 가장 중요한 점 중 하나.
음식 담기전에 전자렌지 돌려서 소독하고 
냉장고 보관 뒤 해동으로 살짝 돌려서 찬기 빼고 바로 급여가능

이 두 단계에서 전자렌지 사용안되면
번거로운 단계 많이 거쳐야함 ㅠㅠ

이게 전자렌지 되는 실리콘을 선호하는 이유


🐶🐕🐶🐕🐶
아이 장건강 회복을 위해 
주 식단은 생식으로 구성하고
여러가지 음식을 천천히 적응 중에 있어요! 

생식 급여 특성상 
위생에 특별한 주의를 기울여야해서 
스크래치가 많이 생기는 플라스틱 식기는 쓰지않고 
열탕 전자렌지 소독이 가능한 실리콘 식기를 선호해왔어요.

그런데 해동을 해서 줘야하기 때문에
전날밤 미리 준비를 해놔야하거든요. 

그래서 실리콘 식기에 미리 준비해두고
뚜껑 덮어놨다가 바로 딱 주고싶다 싶어서
밥그릇 사이즈에 맞는 실리콘 뚜껑같은 걸 많이 찾아봤어요.

랩으로 감아두는 건 실리콘 식기 특성상 
말랑거려서 밀착 밀폐가 안되거든요ㅠ

찾아봐도 지금 쓰는 식기에는 사이즈가 맞는 뚜껑이 없고
또 메추리알때문에 뽈록 올라와 밀폐가 안되고
여러모로 아쉬워서 
뚜껑이랑 세트인 거 없을까 하던 차에
🧡바잇미 실리콘팟을 딱 발견!

실리콘 팟 전에는 실리콘 반찬통에 담아다녔는데 
밀폐가 더 안정적이게 되기는 하나 
플라스틱 뚜껑 내구성이 안좋아서
마침 갈아줘야할 때가 됐는데 
맘에 드는 제품 만나게 돼서 몇개 더 구매할 예정!

완전 진심으로 맘에 들었기 때문에 강추한다.

동결건조, 탈수건조사료, 습식, 물간식 식단하시는 분들께도 너무 좋을 거 같아요~!!

먹던 간식, 밥 잠시 보간하는 용도도 짱 좋아

색깔도 4가지라 용도구분도 할 수 있음! 💛💜💚🤍
reviews.content_en:
🌟 Points I absolutely love about it ✨

1️⃣ Uses platinum silicone! 👍
It's a trustworthy, safe material. When it comes to dinnerware and items that touch your pet's mouth, the material really matters. That's why there's a price difference. Platinum is the safest grade of silicone!

2️⃣ Airtight lid
The lid was a must-have feature, and the fact that it seals airtight is perfect. I prep meals the night before with frozen ingredients, wrap it in a bag, and commute with my pup the next morning. When I open it at the office, nothing leaked and everything stayed perfectly fresh—so satisfied!! 😚

3️⃣ Perfect size
It's the ideal size for a small dog's meals. The food amount doesn't look too little or overflow—it holds just the right portion beautifully! The depth is perfect too, so I don't need to transfer it anywhere else. I can just open the lid and serve it straight in the bowl, which is so convenient! 😁

4️⃣ Pretty color and great finish
The molded edges are sharp but not bothersome at all. The inside is smooth, making it easy to wash and more hygienic! You can tell at a glance that this is a product made with lots of thought and care. 👀

5️⃣ Microwave and boiling water sterilization safe!
This is also one of the most important points for convenient use. I microwave to sterilize before adding food, and after refrigeration, I can microwave briefly to thaw and remove the chill before serving right away.

If the silicone couldn't handle microwaving, there would be so many tedious steps involved. ㅠㅠ

This is why I prefer silicone that's microwave-safe.

🐶🐕🐶🐕🐶
To support my pup's digestive health recovery, our main diet consists of raw food, and we're slowly adapting to various foods!

Because of the nature of raw feeding, we have to pay special attention to hygiene, so we don't use plastic dishes that scratch easily. Instead, we prefer silicone dishes that can be sterilized with boiling water and microwaves.

But since we need to thaw the food before serving, I have to prep everything the night before.

So I wanted to prep in a silicone dish, cover it with a lid, and serve it right away whenever. I looked everywhere for a silicone lid that would fit my rice bowl size.

Wrapping it in plastic wrap doesn't work because silicone dishes are soft and flexible, so they don't seal properly. ㅠㅠ

Even after searching, I couldn't find a lid that fit my current dishes. Plus, because of the quail eggs that stick up, it wouldn't seal airtight. I was disappointed about a lot of things, so I was wondering if there was a matching set with a lid...

🧡 Then I found BITE ME silicone pot perfectly!

Before the silicone pot, I carried food in a silicone side dish container, which seals more stably, but the plastic lid didn't have good durability, so it was time to replace it anyway. I'm so happy to have found a product I love, and I'm planning to buy a few more!

I genuinely love it so much that I highly recommend it.

I think it would be perfect for people doing freeze-dried, dehydrated, wet, or water treat diets too~!!

It's also great for temporarily storing treats and meals.

With 4 color options, you can also organize by use! 💛💜💚🤍

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
성분도 좋고 기호성도 좋아요.
입짧은 강쥐 밥위에 토핑으로 올려줬는데 입맛이 돌았는지 순삭했어요.
reviews.content_en: Great ingredients and good palatability. My picky eater dog finished it in a snap when I sprinkled it on top of his regular food—his appetite came back!

reviews.name: 황****
reviews.content:
괜찮은 간식 같아서 구매했는데 잘 먹어요! 
귀엽기도 하고 일석이조입니다 ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: I bought it thinking it was a decent treat, and he eats it well! Plus it's cute, so it's killing two birds with one stone. ㅎㅎ

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
동결건조 유산균 치즈라 기호성 너무 좋아서 
밥 위에 올려주면 가장 먼저 먹어요! 
모양도 예쁘지만 저도 하나 먹어보니 맛있어요ㅎㅎ 
바삭해서 아작아작 잘 씹구요 
유산균 꼭 챙겨주고 있어서 
매일 밥시간이 즐거울거 같아요
단호박&브로콜리로 야채 채워주고 
딸기&블루베리로 과일도 채워줍니다 ㅎㅎ 기존에 실리콘팟 연보라색도 쓰고 있었는데
멜론색상 너무 예뻐요! 식세기 넣어도 되고 
렌지에 돌려도 가능해서 편하니 손이 자주 가네요:) 
흰색도 살까봐요 ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en:
Since it's freeze-dried probiotic cheese, the palatability is amazing—he eats it first when I sprinkle it on top of his rice! The shape is pretty, and I even tried one myself and it tastes good! ㅎㅎ It's crispy and crunchy, and since I'm making sure to include probiotics daily, mealtime is going to be fun every day. I supplement with butternut squash & broccoli for veggies and strawberry & blueberry for fruit. ㅎㅎ

I was already using the pale purple BITE ME silicone pot, but the melon color is so pretty! It's convenient since you can put it in the dishwasher and microwave it too, so I find myself reaching for it often. :) I'm thinking about getting the white one too! ㅎㅎ

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
저희 강아지가 고기만큼이나 좋아하는 간식이 치즈인데 바잇미에서 치즈간식이..🤍
뚜껑 여는 소리 들리면 바로 달려와서 달라고 보챕니다 ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ

꽃모양 너무 귀엽고 색도 예뻐요!!
지방도 낮아서 노즈워크 간식으로도 좋고 저처럼 산책 후 직접 만든 수제아이스크림 위에 토핑으로도 최고입니댜👍

특히 유산균 겸용으로도 먹일 수 있어서 너무 좋아요!! 성분도 좋아서 앞으로도 자주 먹일 간식><😁 

리틀코티지 간식 왕추천합니댜..🫰바잇미 사랑훼..😍
reviews.content_en:
Our pup loves cheese just as much as meat, and BITE ME has cheese treats! 🤍
The moment he hears the lid open, he comes running and begs for some ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ

The flower shape is so adorable and the colors are so pretty!!
With low fat content, they're great for nose work treats, and like I do, they're perfect as a topping on homemade ice cream after walks too 👍

Especially since I can give them while also giving probiotics, it's amazing!! The ingredients are so good that I'll definitely keep feeding them often ><😁

Little Cottage treats are highly recommended..🫰 Love BITE ME..😍

reviews.content:
꽃모양으로 딸기&블루베리🩷 단호박&브로콜리💛 알록달록 귀여워요
유산균은 가루형태로만 급여했었는데 트릿형식으로 매일 간식처럼 급여할수 있어 최고에요! 음수량 부족한 댕친구들은 물에 녹여줘도 잘먹을거같아요!! 장건강과 뼈,치아를 위해 리틀코티지 합시당!!

급여하는 Tip❤️
- 트릿 그대로 간식처럼 부담없이 급여
- 음수량 채워야하는 댕이들은 물에녹여 급여
- 사료토핑으로도 최고✌🏻

너무 잘먹어서 간식처럼 맛별로 하루4알 급여중이에요
인공첨가물이 없어 건강한간식! 개봉하면 꼭 냉장보관해주세욤!!
reviews.content_en:
Flower-shaped with strawberry & blueberry 🩷 and pumpkin & broccoli 💛 - so cute and colorful!
I used to only give probiotics in powder form, but now I can give them like treats every day in this treat form - it's the best! I think pups who don't drink enough water would eat them well if dissolved in water too!! For gut health and bones and teeth, let's go with Little Cottage!!

Feeding Tips ❤️
- Give as a treat straight from the package without worry
- For pups that need more water intake, dissolve in water and feed
- Perfect as a food topper ✌🏻

Eats it so well that I'm giving 4 pieces a day by flavor as a treat
No artificial additives - it's a healthy treat! Please refrigerate immediately after opening!

reviews.name: 방****
reviews.content:
10살 포메, 6살 삽살이 1살 진도를 키우면서 세마리의
강아지 기호를 맞추기 쉽지 않는데,고기간식도 아닌데 아이들이 이렇게 잘먹는 간식은..처음입니다👍👍
(둘째는 너무 맛있어서 침을…🤤)
첫째는 나이도 있고 조심해야될게 많은데 고단백, 저지방, 저염, 저칼로리까지 찰떡이더라고요!!!
둘째와 셋째는 장이 약해서 수시로 병원방문하면서 유산균도 같이 먹습니다! 3일동안 먹는데…강아지가 똥을 싸는게 엄청 편해졌어요!!하루에 한번 싸는 똥도 2번씩 편안하게 싸는걸 보니…정말 강추입니다!!!👍👍👍
reviews.content_en:
With a 10-year-old Pom, 6-year-old Shih Tzu, and 1-year-old Jindo, it's not easy to match all three dogs' preferences, but this isn't even a meat treat and it's the first time they eat a snack this well 👍👍
(The second one drools so much over how delicious it is 🤤)
The first one is getting older and needs careful consideration, and high protein, low fat, low sodium, low calorie - it's perfect!!!
The second and third have sensitive stomachs so we visit the vet regularly and give them probiotics too! After eating for 3 days... my dog's bowel movements became so much easier!! I'm seeing him go from once a day to twice a day comfortably, so I really highly recommend it!!! 👍👍👍

reviews.name: 예****
reviews.content:
택배오자마자 자기꺼는 기가막히게 아는 저희집 먼뚱이 :-)
바잇미에서 새로 출시된 유산균 동결건조 치즈 먹여 보았눙데여 포장 뜯자마자 얼마나 난리가 나던지,, 냄새만 맡아도 기호성이 최곤가봐요!! 식이알러지가 있어서 아무거나 먹이지 못하는데 요 제품은 성분도 좋고 무엇보다 밥꾸템 강추 제품입니다 색깔이며 모양이며 너무 좋잖아요?! 저는 물간식으로 리틀코티지 올려서 음수량 채워줘요🩵 집사님들 치킨값 아껴서 댕댕이 좋은거 먹이자구요!
reviews.content_en:
Our Meuntung at home somehow magically knows which treat is hers the moment the package arrives :-)
I tried the new freeze-dried cheese with probiotics that BITE ME just released, and the moment I opened the package, oh my, what a fuss! Just from smelling it, I can tell the palatability is top-notch!! Since she has food allergies I can't feed her just anything, but this product has great ingredients and above all, it's a must-recommend for meal toppers. The colors and shape are just so nice, right?! I dissolve Little Cottage in water for her to increase her water intake 🩵 Hey fur parents, save the chicken money and feed your pup something good!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
치즈간식은 처음이지만 너무 잘 먹어요!!!
마음이 급해서 세트로 사면 실리콘팟 엄청 싸게 살 수 있는걸 몰랐어요 흑흑
메론색으로 또 주문할라구요~~~
처음에 걱정돼서 제가 직접 한입 먹어봤는데 저는 이에 좀 붙더라구요ㅜㅜ
그래서 손으로 톡 쪼개서 줘보니 처음엔 이랑 혀에 붙는 가벼운 간식이라 어색해하더니만 금새 오도독오도독 잘 먹어서 기분 좋았답니다ㅎㅎㅎ
강아지 유산균 알아보던 차에 간식으로 줄 수 있는 예쁜모양 치즈, 밥꾸 별 거 있나요? 
그냥 밥그릇에 올리면 끝~ 
진짜 밥꾸템 단골 예약이에요~
reviews.content_en:
It's my first time with cheese treats but my pup eats them so well!!!
I was in a rush and didn't know I could get the silicon pot super cheap when buying the set 😭
I'm planning to order again in the melon color~~~
At first I was worried so I tried one myself, and it stuck to my teeth a bit ㅜㅜ
So I broke it up with my hand and gave it to her. At first she was confused since it's a light treat that sticks to teeth and tongue, but soon she was happily crunching away, and I felt so good 😊😊😊
While looking into dog probiotics, is there anything better than a pretty-shaped cheese treat I can give as a snack and meal topper?
Just sprinkle it on the food bowl and you're done~
It's definitely my go-to meal topper staple now!

reviews.name: 구****
reviews.content:
기호도가 너무 좋아서 새로 사준 간식인데도 울집 러블리 뜨리멍이가 모두 관심 갖고 잘먹었어요🩵 향, 맛도 그렇고 식감도 거부감 없어서 아이들이 너무 잘 먹습니다. 
패키지도 귀여워서 뭔가 간식 줄 때마다 귀여운 인증샷 하나씩 잘 건질수 있어용 !! 
유산균 따로 먹이는 거 힘든데  간식으로 먹일 수 있어서 좋습니당 😉
reviews.content_en: The palatability is so good that even though it's a new treat, my lovely Truemung loves it and eats it all up 🩵 The flavor and taste are great, and the texture is so appealing that the kids just devour it. The packaging is so cute too—I can get an adorable photo proof every time I give them a treat!! 🐾 It's been hard to feed probiotics separately, but it's so convenient to give them through treats 😉

reviews.name: 심****
reviews.content:
모양도 색깔도 예쁜 동결건조 치즈간식이에요 ㅎㅎ
두가지 종류 모두 기호성 너무 좋아요.
제일 중요한! 변 상태도 좋았습니다.

용기가 작아서 산책시 가지고 다니면서
트릿으로 간편하게 급여가능하고
식사 토핑용으로도 좋은 특별하고 유용한 간식입니다^^
reviews.content_en: Such a pretty freeze-dried cheese treat with a nice shape and color ㅎㅎ Both varieties have amazing palatability. And most importantly! Their poop looked great too. The container is small, so you can easily carry it on walks and use it as a convenient treat, and it's also great as a meal topper—a special and useful snack ^^

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
바삭바삭한지 입맛까다로운 우리 애기가 너무 잘먹고 좋아해여 동결건조리코타치즈는 처음인데 대대만족입니당
 지금 다이어트 중인데 칼로리가 낮아서 너무 좋아요
꽃모양이라서 이쁘기도 ..❤️ 
제일 마음에 드는 건 물에 섞어서 물간식으로 줄 수 있는거 !
내 새끼 음수량은 내가 책임진다!!
reviews.content_en: The crunchy texture has my picky eater devouring it and loving it! This is my first time with freeze-dried ricotta cheese and I'm totally satisfied 💕 I'm on a diet right now and the low calories are amazing The flower shape is so pretty too..❤️ But my favorite thing is that I can mix it with water and give it as a hydration treat! I'm taking charge of my baby's water intake!!

reviews.name: 단****
reviews.content:
비숑 페키 두마리중 페키니즈는 유산균을 먹이면 묽은변을 보는 것 같아 유산균 안주고있었어요 그러다 동결건조 치즈유산균이 바잇미에 나왔길래 한번 믿구 먹여보자! 하고 겟 ❤️
아침한알 저녁한알 주는데 기호성은 물론 설사도 없고 배에 꾸르륵 소리도 안나요.. 예쁜응가는 덤.. 🐻
치즈맛이 나서 그런가 두마리 모두가 뚜껑 여는 소리만 들려도 둘다 자다말고 뛰어나와요 기호성좋은 건강한 리틀코티지 유산균 🫶🏼 또 시킬게요 감사합니다 잘 먹일게요!
reviews.content_en: Out of my two Bichons and Pekingese, whenever I give the Pekingese probiotics, he gets loose stool, so I wasn't giving him any. Then when BITE ME came out with freeze-dried cheese probiotics, I thought let me just trust it and try it! ❤️ I give one in the morning and one at night—not only does he love it, but no diarrhea and no tummy gurgles either.. and pretty poops are a bonus.. 🐻 Since it tastes like cheese, both of them jump out of bed the moment they hear the lid open—great palatability with healthy Little Cottage probiotics 🫶🏼 I'll order again soon. Thank you and I'll feed it well!

reviews.name: 신****
reviews.content:
체험단으로 리틀코티지 유산균치즈 2종을 먹어봤어요
치즈간식이라 처음 뜯었을때 시콤새콤한 향이 나는데 뚜비는 냄새를 맡자마자 침샘폭발💦 침줄줄🤤
기호성은 너어어어무 좋아서 아삭아삭 소리내면서 맛있게 잘먹더라구요!! 
사료토핑으로 올려 귀여우면서 영양가 있는 밥을 주게되니 기부니가 좋더라구요😋 
치즈간식은 앞으로 바잇미 리틀코티지치즈 너로 정했다😎
reviews.content_en: I tried 2 types of Little Cottage probiotic cheese as a tester. Since it's a cheese treat, when I first opened it there was a tangy cheese aroma, and Dubi's salivary glands exploded the moment he smelled it💦 Drooling 🤤 The palatability is sooo good—he ate it with such a nice crunchy sound and clearly enjoyed it!! When I sprinkle it on his kibble, I'm giving him a cute but nutritious meal, and he's so happy about it 😋 From now on, I've decided on BITE ME Little Cottage cheese treats for my go-to 😎

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content:
5키로 말티즈 흉통이 큰편이고 다리가 길쭉 길쭉한 아이입니다! 

사이즈는 상의는 L / 모자는 M 사이즈 구매했는데 딱 잘 맞습니다!! 

디자인 너무 귀엽고, 통기서 너무 좋고, 신축성도 쫜쫜하고 아주 좋습니다.

포차코 콜라보라고 해서 콜라보 전제품 구매해 버렸습니다 ... !

귀여운거옆에 귀여운거라니 이보다 좋은수가 없네요~~완전 베리굿 입니다요!!

5.6kg 둘찌 고양이에겐 좀 타이트 합니다!
물론 첫찌 멈뭉이가 입을거지만 제질이 좋아 고양이도 함께 입혀 보았습니다 ㅋㅋㅋ
reviews.content_en: My 5kg Maltese has a broad chest and long, slender legs! I bought size L for the top and size M for the hat, and they fit perfectly!! The design is so cute, the breathability is great, and the elasticity is perfect - very nice. Since it was a BITE ME collaboration, I ended up buying all the collaboration products...! Cute next to cute - can't ask for better than this~~totally great!! For my 5.6kg second cat, it's a bit tight! Of course the first one will wear it, but the material is so good that I tried it on the cat too haha

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
칼로리에 예민한 저는 칼로리도 적고, 기호성도 너무 좋았어요💙⭐️ 
예쁜 꽃 모양으로 밥꾸할 때도 부담 없이 예쁘게 줄 수 있었고, 원형 통 안에 들어있어 보관도 너무 좋아요 🙊💡

베지, 푸룻으로 구성되어 있어 영양 챙기기에도 좋았구 전 항상 애기들 먹이기 전에 제가 먼저 먹어보는데, 제가 먹어도 맛있었어요 !!!
reviews.content_en: As someone sensitive to calories, I loved that it's low-calorie and has great palatability💙⭐️ With the pretty flower shape, I could give it nicely without worry when garnishing meals, and it comes in a round container so storage is so convenient 🙊💡 It's made with vegetables and fruit so it's great for nutrition, and I always taste-test it myself before feeding it to the babies, and it was delicious even for me!!!

reviews.name: 조****
reviews.content:
바잇미 리틀코티즈치즈🌼
일단 모양이 귀여워서 밥꾸하기에 좋고 기호성도 좋아요!
식감은 파사삭 부서지는 느낌이라서 야무지게 잘 씹어먹는답니다
유산균까지 들어있어서 끙아도 더 예뻐지길 기대해볼게오✨
reviews.content_en: BITE ME Little Cottage Cheese🌼 First of all, the shape is cute so it's great for meal garnishing and has good palatability! The texture is crumbly and crunchy so they chew it well The fact that it contains probiotics makes me hopeful they'll get even prettier ✨

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content:
댕댕이 밥꾸할때 유용해요!! 요거 하나만 올려줘도 맘마 분위기가 달라져요
살짝 부셔서 물위에 뿌려주면 음수량 채우기도 좋더라구요

기호성 좋고 성분도 좋고 너무 귀엽게 생겨서 다 먹이면 또 구매할 것 같아요👌🏻
reviews.content_en: So useful when doing meal garnishing for pups!! Just adding one of these changes the whole vibe of mealtime With a slight crumble, sprinkling it on water is also great for increasing water intake The palatability is good, the ingredients are good, and it looks so cute - I'll definitely buy it again once they finish it👌🏻

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 입맛 까다로운 즤집 강아지가 밥 그릇 놓자말자 이거 먼저 먹네요! 밥 투정하는 강아지들에게도 좋을거같아요 잘 먹고 바삭바삭 먹는소리 식감도 너무 재밌어요 ㅎㅎ 밥꾸에 진심인 보호자도 모양이며 색깔이며 귀영워서 기절~
reviews.content_en: My picky eater dog goes for this first the moment I put down the food bowl! I think it would be good for dogs that are fussy about kibble too The crunchy, crispy texture and sound while eating is so fun hehe Even a parent who takes meal garnishing seriously goes crazy over how cute the shape and colors are~

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
치즈는 처음 먹여봤는데 너무 잘먹어서 놀랐어요! 오독오독 바사삭 잘 씹어먹고 작은 사이즈라 고양이들도 잘먹는 것 같아요👏🏻
유산균 따로 먹이지 않아도 이거 하나로 해결가능해서 편하고 밥꾸용으로도 딱이네요🌸 손으로도 잘쪼개자고 부스러지니까 물에 타줘도 딱입니당
reviews.content_en: First time trying cheese and was surprised how well she ate it! Crunchy and crispy, really chewing well, and the small size means cats eat it well too👏🏻 Convenient since you don't need to feed probiotics separately - this takes care of it, and it's perfect for meal garnishing🌸 Easy to break by hand and crumbly, so it works great mixed in water too

reviews.name: 하****
reviews.content:
🧀🌸바잇미 리틀코티지 유산균치즈🌸🧀
좋은 기회로 체험단에 선정되어 아이들이 좋아하는 치즈+유산균 합 급여해봤습니다~~
저희는 주로 밥꾸템으로 유산균으로 급여했어요!
물간식으로 줘도 너무너무 잘먹는데
밥꾸가 취미인 엄마는 밥주면서 행복했지 모에요ㅎㅎㅎ
3둥이 13살 할배, 8살 아재, 1살 반 막내까지
모두모두 기호성 최강!!!
사르르 부셔져서 가루 토핑으로도 잘먹는데
너무 예뻐서 부수기 아숩🥲

기호성 최강에, 유산균으로 장건강까지 챙길 수 있는
리틀 코티지 유산균치즈 추천합니다🫸🏻🫷🏻🤍🤜🏻🤛🏻❤️👍🏻
reviews.content_en: 🧀🌸BITE ME Little Cottage Probiotic Cheese🌸🧀 Got selected for a trial and fed my kids the combination of cheese and probiotics they love~~ We mainly gave it as meal garnish and probiotic supplement! Even as a water snack they eat it so so well My mom-of-the-house with meal garnishing as a hobby was definitely happy giving meals hehehe From my 3 kids - 13-year-old grandpa, 8-year-old middle child, to the 1.5-year-old maknae All have top-notch palatability!!! Gets crumbly so it works great as powder topping too It's so pretty I feel bad breaking it apart🥲 With top-notch palatability and probiotics for gut health, I recommend Little Cottage Probiotic Cheese🫸🏻🫷🏻🤍🤜🏻🤛🏻❤️👍🏻

reviews.name: 강****
reviews.content:
우리집 멍뭉이 new 밥꾸템!
바잇미 신상 리틀코티지 유산균치즈 🧀 

두가지 종류로 너무 귀요운데 맛까지 좋은지 엄청 잘 먹어요!

유산균 치즈 트릿인만큼 장건강에도 도움이 될것 같고 
밥꾸 뿐만 아니라 칭찬 간식으로도 좋을것 같아요~!!
reviews.content_en: Our pup's new meal garnish item! BITE ME new Little Cottage Probiotic Cheese 🧀 Two different types and so adorable, plus tastes good too - eating it really well! Since it's a probiotic cheese treat, it should help with gut health too and seems good not just for meal garnishing but also as a praise snack~!!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
유산균인데 안에 코티지치즈가 들어있어서
기호성이 정말 좋았어요.
꽃모양트릿이라서 모양도 귀엽구용

급여방법도 그냥 그대로 줘도 되고,
사료 토핑으로 줘도되고, 물에 띄워주면 음수량도
채울 수 있어 편하게 급여 가능했습니다.

양도 넉넉한데 가성비도 좋아요 ~ !
reviews.content_en: It's a probiotic with cottage cheese inside so the palatability was really good. It's flower-shaped treats so the shape is cute too The feeding method is flexible - you can give it as-is, use it as kibble topping, or float it in water to increase water intake, so it's convenient to give. The amount is generous and the value for money is good too~!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 바삭바삭한 식감이라 너무 잘 먹어요. 치즈간식들은 꼬릿한 냄새때문에 별론데, 바잇미 리틀 코티지는 냄새도 많이 강하지 않아서 거부감없이 잘 먹더라구요. 가루날림도 없고 가볍게 챙겨주기 너무 좋아요.
reviews.content_en: The crispy texture makes them eat it really well. I'm not usually into cheese treats because of their strong smell, but BITE ME Little Cottage doesn't have a strong smell so they eat it without any hesitation. No powder flying around and it's so light and easy to give.

reviews.name: 배****
reviews.content: 너무너무 잘 사용중이에요!! 사료를 가끔 남길때도 있는데 뚜껑 챱! 덮어서 보관하기도 너무 좋아요💛 전자렌지 돌려도 끄떡없고 말랑말랑하니 너무 좋습니다!!👏🏻👏🏻👏🏻
reviews.content_en: Using it so so well!! Even when they sometimes leave their kibble, I just pop the lid on for storage which is so convenient💛 Microwave safe and flexible, so it's perfect!!👏🏻👏🏻👏🏻

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content:
이번에 새로 출시된 리틀 코티지 먹여봤는데요!
일단 냄새는 진짜 코티지 치즈청룸 살짝 시큼하고 쿰쿰한 냄새가 났고 트릿형태라 소형견인 저희 강아지한테 딱 알맞은 크기라 먹이기 좋았어요! 무엇보다 유산균이 들어있어서 겸용으로 주기에도 부담없어요!  밥꾸템으로 포인트 주기 좋아서 자주 사용할 것 같습니당 ;)
reviews.content_en: Tried the newly released Little Cottage and the smell is like actual cottage cheese - slightly sour and a bit funky - and since it's treat-shaped it's the perfect size for my small dog to eat! Most importantly it has probiotics so it's easy to give as a dual-purpose treat! Great for adding as a garnish point so I think I'll use it often ;)

reviews.name: 윤****
reviews.content:
넘모 애쁜 밥꾸템 추가댓어여!! 알록달록 꽃모양 🌸🌼
유산균은 필수인거아시죠 ~ ? 
치즈로 유산균도 챙기고 너무 맛있을거같은 냄새까지 ,, 
가루가 잘 생겨서 음수량 채워주기도 딱 좋아요 💪🏼
reviews.content_en: Added such a cute meal garnish item!! Colorful flower shapes 🌸🌼 Probiotics are essential right~? Getting probiotics through cheese and such a delicious-smelling treat,, it crumbles well so it's perfect for increasing water intake too 💪🏼

reviews.name: 곽****
reviews.content:
요즘 너무 핫한 유산균치즈 간식❣️❣️
저희 애기가 너무 좋아해용❤️ 
간식으로 줘도 너무 잘먹고 사료랑같이줘도 난리나요🥰🥰
치즈 특유의 꼬릿한 냄새 당연히없구용 
먹으면서 가루날림 전혀~ 없어용 ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: The trendy probiotic cheese snack these days❣️❣️ My baby loves it so much❤️ Eats it well even as a snack and goes crazy when given with kibble🥰🥰 Of course no cheese smell haha No powder flying around at all while eating ㅎㅎ

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
뭐예요 이거?!???
너무귀엽고 맛있는데요?
일단..가루가 많이 생겨서 오긴해요ㅜㅜ
근데 애들이 형태가 살아있어요 뚜껑열면 약간 새콤시큼한 냄새가 나지만!
바삭바삭 엄청 잘먹네요~
이거먹으려고 쉬짜내고 왔어요ㅋㅋ
reviews.content_en: What is this?!??? So cute and delicious? Well... it does create a lot of powder ㅜㅜ But the kids' shapes stay intact when you open the lid there's a slightly sour-sweet smell but! They eat it super crunchy~~ They came out of siesta time to eat this haha

reviews.name: 현****
reviews.content:
3키로대 강아지가 먹기에 트릿 크기가 아주 적당해요!

모양도 뾰족한곳 없이 둥글둥글해서 급여할때 걱정이 없고, 프로바이오틱스가 들어있어 유산균 잘 안먹는 아이에게 급여하기에도 좋아요👍🏻

맛있는지 아이들도 너무너무 잘 먹어요!
모양도 색도 예뻐서 우리애기 밥꾸하기에 딱이에요🌸
reviews.content_en: For a 3kg dog the treat size is very appropriate! The shape is all smooth and round with no sharp points so no worry when giving, and since it contains probiotics it's great for dogs that don't usually like probiotic treats👍🏻 The kids eat it really really well! The shape and color are pretty so it's perfect for our baby's meal time🌸

reviews.name: 신****
reviews.content:
유산균 치즈 거의 다 먹어서 행사하길래 행사가로 구입~
울 큰딸래미가 올해 14살인데 치아가 거의 다빠졌어요ㅠㅠ
근데 요 유산균치즈는 너무 잘먹기도 하고 무엇보다 영양간식이라 더 좋은거 같아요~^^
reviews.content_en: Almost finished the probiotic cheese so bought it on sale~ My oldest is 14 this year and has lost almost all her teeth ㅠㅠ But she eats this probiotic cheese really well and most importantly since it's a nutritious treat it seems even better~^^

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content: 동글동글 트릿형태 유산균이라 먹기 편하고 색감도 기여워요🩷💚 유당 걱정없어서 안심하고 먹일수 있을것 같아요🌸
reviews.content_en: Round treat-shaped probiotics so easy to eat and the colors are cute🩷💚 No worries about lactose so can feel confident feeding it🌸

reviews.name: 임****
reviews.content: 사실 밥꾸하려고 샀는데 너무 귀엽구.. 유산균 트릿으로 주기에 또 간편하구 다 먹으면 다른 맛도 사야겟어요🤍
reviews.content_en: Actually bought it for meal garnishing but it's so cute.. and convenient to give as probiotic treats, when they finish it I'll have to get another flavor🤍

reviews.name: 주****
reviews.content:
치즈 좋아하는 울 강아지
냄새 맡자마자 바로 달라구 꼬리 흔들고 난리났어요!
기호성 최고⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️
물간식으로 줘도 너무 잘 먹고, 음수량 채우기도 좋아요!
장 건강을 위해 밥에 토핑으로도 올려주니
밥도 더 잘먹고, 밥꾸하기에도 너무 예뻐요 💙
reviews.content_en: My dog who loves cheese caught the scent and immediately asked for it with tail wagging - total excitement! Top-tier palatability⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️ Eats so well even as a water snack and great for increasing water intake! Topping it on kibble for gut health means they eat the kibble better too and it's so pretty for meal time 💙
